SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.optic

Interface AffineTraversal<S,A>

All Known Subinterfaces:
Lens<S,A>, Prism<S,A>
public interface AffineTraversal<S,A>
An optic that focuses on at most one element. Effectively a combination of a Lens and a Prism.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Fold<S,A>
    asFold()
    Views this affine traversal as a read-only Fold.
    default Traversal<S,A>

    Converts this optional focus into a mandatory lens by providing a default value.
